posts.author: Investor_Pro_88
posts.text: I've been looking into this new decentralized finance project. They claim to have a revolutionary way to generate passive income through automated yield farming. It's a bit complicated, but I've seen people making huge profits. Message me for the whitepaper and I can walk you through the setup.
posts.explanation: The post describes a complex investment opportunity with 'guaranteed' high returns, which qualifies as a plausible, complex fraud requiring investigation.
